args: if [ -f "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local" ]; then . "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local"; fi; export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH"; exec npx -y mcp-remote "https://mcp.tavily.com/mcp/?tavilyApiKey=${TAVILY_API_KEY}"

if [ -f "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local" ]; then . "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local"; fi; export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH"; exec npx -y @brave/brave-search-mcp-server --transport stdio

if [ -f "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local" ]; then . "$HOME/.dotfiles/.env.local"; fi; export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH"; exec npx -y mcp-remote "$YOUTRACK_URL/mcp" --header "Authorization:Bearer $YOUTRACK_TOKEN"
